radio_buttons.description: Configuration for the radio button group component that displays selectable subscription package options. Contains the style type, list of button definitions, purchase behavior, and indicator alignment settings.

indicator_alignment.description: Controls the position of the selection indicator (radio dot) within each radio button. Accepted values are "right" (indicator on the right side), "none" (no indicator shown), or any other value/null defaults to left alignment.

buttons.description: List of individual radio button configurations. Each entry references a subscription button definition and defines the button's selection state, colors, badge, and visual style. Rendered as selectable package options on the offer screen.

badge.description: Optional badge/label configuration displayed on the radio button, typically used to highlight promotions or discounts. Contains text, colors for selected and deselected states, a variant style, and visibility control.

color.description: The text color of the badge label. Used as the badge text color in the selected state. Value is a color string resolved by the design system.

deselected_text_color.description: The text color of the badge when the radio button is in the deselected state. Value is a color string resolved by the design system.

deselected_bg_color.description: The background color of the badge when the radio button is in the deselected state. Value is a color string resolved by the design system.

variant.description: The visual variant/style of the badge. Passed to RadioBoxBadge and used to determine how the badge is rendered on the radio button.

hide_on_deselected_state.description: When true, the badge is hidden when the radio button is in the deselected state and only shown when the button is selected.

text.description: The display text shown inside the badge label on the radio button (e.g. a promotional tag or discount label).

selected_bg_color.description: Background color of the radio button when it is in the selected state. Value is a color string resolved by the design system's CascadeColorPackage.

disabled_text_color.description: Text color of the radio button when it is in the deselected (non-selected) state. Value is a color string resolved by the design system's CascadeColorPackage.

selected_border_color.description: Border color of the radio button when it is in the selected state. Value is a color string resolved by the design system's CascadeColorPackage.

is_selected.description: Indicates whether this radio button is initially selected when the offer screen loads. Exactly one button in the list should have this set to true.

is_enlarged_button_component.description: When true, the radio button is rendered in an enlarged/expanded layout variant, giving it more visual prominence compared to the standard size.

id.description: References a SubscriptionButtonApiModel by its id from the remote settings key "subscription_button". Used to look up the button's CTA configuration, main button colors, secondary CTA, and associated package info.

disabled_background_color.description: Background color of the radio button when it is in the deselected (non-selected) state. Value is a color string resolved by the design system's CascadeColorPackage.

border_color.description: Border color of the radio button when it is in the deselected (non-selected) state. Value is a color string resolved by the design system's CascadeColorPackage.

gradient_type.description: Defines the gradient style applied to the radio button's badge area. The value is passed to RadioBoxBadge.gradientType and used to render gradient effects on the badge.

purchase_on_select.description: When true, selecting (double-tapping) a radio button immediately triggers the subscription purchase flow for that package, without requiring a separate CTA button tap.

type.description: Determines the visual style of the radio button group. When set to "tiers_style", the buttons are rendered in the TiersStyle layout. Any other value (or null) results in the DefaultStyle layout.

trial_reminder_toggle.description: Configuration reference for a toggle switch related to trial reminder functionality on the offer screen. Uses the same SubscriptionToggleApiModel structure as switch_package_toggle but serves a distinct purpose for trial reminders.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the trial reminder toggle is fetched and displayed. Defaults to false if not provided. When false, the trial reminder toggle component is not shown on the offer screen.

id.description: References a SubscriptionToggleApiModel by its id from the remote settings key "offer_promotion_toggle". Used to look up the trial reminder toggle's enabled/disabled states with their titles, subtitles, descriptions, package IDs, and view styling.

toggle_placeholder_text.description: Configuration reference for placeholder text displayed in the toggle area of the offer screen. Rendered using the title component mapper, providing styled text content near the toggle switches.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the toggle placeholder text is fetched and displayed. Defaults to true if not provided. When false, the toggle placeholder text is not shown.

id.description: References a SubscriptionTitleApiModel by its id from the remote settings key "offer_toggle_placeholder_text". Uses the title field of the referenced model for the placeholder text and color.

feature_highlights.description: Configuration reference for the feature highlights component, which displays a list of feature items on the offer screen. Each item consists of an icon image, a title, and a subtitle to highlight key subscription benefits. Hidden when the items list is empty.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the feature highlights component is fetched and displayed. Defaults to false if not provided. When false, the feature highlights view is hidden (GONE).

id.description: References a FeatureHighlightsApiModel by its id from the remote settings key "offer_screen_feature_highlights". Used to look up the list of feature highlight items, each with an icon URL, title, and subtitle.

content_id.description: Unique identifier for this screen content configuration. Used to match the screen to a touchpoint name (e.g. "default") when loading the Optimus subscription offer screen. The value is matched against the requested screen name in OptimusScreenRepoImpl to select which screen layout to display.

footer.description: Configuration reference for a footer text component at the bottom of the offer screen. Displays styled text that can optionally be tappable to open a deeplink action. Hidden when the text is empty.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the footer component is fetched and displayed. Defaults to false if not provided. When false, the footer text view is hidden (GONE).

id.description: References a FooterApiModel by its id from the remote settings key "offer_screen_footers". Used to look up the footer text, color, and optional action deeplink.

banner.description: Configuration reference for the main banner component displayed at the top of the offer screen. The banner supports different types and contains a list of banner values with image URLs, click actions, and placeholder images.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the banner component is fetched and displayed. Defaults to true if not provided. When false, the banner view is not initialized on the screen.

id.description: References a SubscriptionBannerApiModel by its id from the remote settings key "offer_screen_banners". Used to look up the banner type and banner values (images/actions).

description.description: Configuration reference for a description text component displayed on the offer screen. Rendered as regular-weight T8 typography text. Hidden when the text content is null or empty.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the description component is fetched and displayed. Defaults to false if not provided. When false, the description text view is hidden (GONE).

id.description: References a SubscriptionTitleApiModel by its id from the remote settings key "offer_screen_descriptions". Uses the title field of the referenced model for the description text and color.

title.description: Configuration reference for the screen title component. The resolved title is displayed as a semi-bold T6 typography text. If title is null but subtitle exists, the subtitle is promoted to the title position in the UI.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the title component is fetched and displayed. Defaults to true if not provided. When false, the title text view is hidden (GONE).

id.description: References a SubscriptionTitleApiModel by its id from the remote settings key "offer_screen_titles". Used to look up the title text and color configuration.

close_button.description: Configuration reference for the close button that dismisses the offer screen. The button supports left or right alignment, custom top and side margins, and an optional custom icon loaded from a URL.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the close button configuration is fetched from remote settings. Defaults to true if not provided. When false, a default close button is still shown but without custom alignment, margins, or icon.

id.description: References a CloseButtonModel by its id from the remote settings key "subscription_screen_close_button". Used to look up the close button visibility, alignment, margins, and optional custom icon URL.

subtitle.description: Configuration reference for the screen subtitle component. Displayed as medium-weight T5 typography text below the title. If the title component is null, the subtitle is promoted to the title position instead.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the subtitle component is fetched and displayed. Defaults to true if not provided. When false, the subtitle text view is hidden (GONE).

id.description: References a SubscriptionTitleApiModel by its id from the remote settings key "offer_screen_subtitles". Used to look up the subtitle text and color configuration.

banner_placeholder.description: Configuration reference for the banner placeholder component, which displays styled text above or overlaying the banner area, optionally with a badge image and a bottom-to-top gradient shadow.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the banner placeholder component is fetched and displayed. Defaults to true if not provided. When false, the banner placeholder text and badge are not rendered on the screen.

id.description: References a SubscriptionBannerPlaceholderApiModel by its id from the remote settings key "offer_banner_placeholder_text". Used to look up the banner placeholder text, badge URL, and shadow configuration.

secondary_button.description: Configuration reference for a secondary action button displayed on the offer screen. The button text is rendered with an underline. Tapping it either opens a deeplink action or launches a subscription tiers half-screen fragment based on the touchpoint.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the secondary button is fetched and displayed. Defaults to true if not provided. When false, the secondary button is hidden (GONE).

id.description: References a SubscriptionSecondaryButtonApiModel by its id from the remote settings key "offer_screen_secondary_button". Used to look up the button text, color, action deeplink, and touchpoint.

logo.description: Configuration reference for a logo image displayed on the offer screen. The logo is loaded from a URL and can have custom width and height dimensions specified in dp. Hidden when the URL is empty.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the logo component is fetched and displayed. Defaults to false if not provided. When false, the logo image view is hidden (GONE).

id.description: References a LogoApiModel by its id from the remote settings key "offer_screen_logos". Used to look up the logo image URL and optional width/height dimensions.

switch_package_toggle.description: Configuration reference for a toggle switch that allows users to switch between different subscription packages on the offer screen. The toggle has enabled and disabled states, each with its own title, subtitle, description, associated package ID, and color styling.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the package-switching toggle is fetched and displayed. Defaults to true if not provided. When false, the toggle component is not shown on the offer screen.

id.description: References a SubscriptionToggleApiModel by its id from the remote settings key "offer_promotion_toggle". Used to look up the toggle's enabled/disabled states with their titles, subtitles, descriptions, package IDs, and view styling.
